_comment: Deterministic red-flag rules. If ANY rule matches the symptom text, the engine forces a SEE-A-DOCTOR signal regardless of LLM output. Patterns are lowercase substrings/keywords matched in English and Hindi (Romanised + Devanagari). This is a safety guardrail, not a diagnosis.

rules.label: Chest pain / pressure (possible cardiac event)
rules.advice: Possible heart emergency. Call emergency services (112 / 108) or go to the nearest hospital immediately.

rules.label: Severe breathing difficulty
rules.advice: Difficulty breathing can be life-threatening. Seek emergency care now (112 / 108).

rules.label: Stroke warning signs (FAST)
rules.advice: Possible stroke. Note the time symptoms started and reach a hospital immediately (112 / 108).

rules.label: Severe / uncontrolled bleeding
rules.advice: Uncontrolled bleeding is an emergency. Apply firm pressure and reach a hospital now (112 / 108).

rules.label: High fever in an infant / very young child
rules.advice: Fever in a baby under 3 months, or a very high fever in a young child, needs a doctor urgently.

rules.label: Unconsciousness / seizure
rules.advice: Loss of consciousness or a seizure needs emergency care immediately (112 / 108).

rules.label: Self-harm / suicidal thoughts
rules.advice: Please reach out now. In India call Tele-MANAS 14416 / KIRAN 1800-599-0019. You are not alone.

rules.label: Severe dehydration signs
rules.advice: Signs of severe dehydration (no urine, sunken eyes, extreme drowsiness) need urgent medical care.

rules.label: Pregnancy warning sign
rules.advice: Bleeding, severe abdominal pain, or reduced baby movement in pregnancy needs a doctor urgently.
